response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio is purely commentary and conversational speech (primarily English with a short section of Japanese dialogue). There is no vocal music, in agreement with the scene analysis. 2. JSON Usage: The reference JSON was fully utilized to establish the structure of scenes and confirm the lack of vocal music. Manual transcription and translation were done for the conversational audio. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps were matched with high precision to the spoken words, with aggressive boundaries used in quick exchanges to prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: I feel like pumpkin is just the way to go because it grows so fast.
